output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here’s How to Get It Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legal demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99. No signup or subscription.
content_outline: The Silent Scam: Why Landlords Keep Deposits You’re Owed
Tenant Rights 101: What Your Landlord Can and Cannot Legally Deduct
The 60-Second Fix: How to Send a Demand Letter Without a Lawyer
What Happens Next: Escalating From Letter to Small Claims Court
key_points: Landlords often withhold deposits illegally because they assume tenants won’t fight back.
State laws protect renters from deductions for normal wear and tear and unsubstantiated cleaning fees.
A formal letter of demand is the fastest, most affordable first step to recover your money.
Deposits-Back.com generates a state-specific demand letter in 60 seconds for a one-time $19.99 fee—no account or subscription required.
output.cta: Stop waiting and stop begging. Generate your official security deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds. One simple payment of $19.99. No signup. No subscription. Just your money back.
output.target_audience: Frustrated U.S. renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding, delaying, or refusing to return a security deposit and need a fast, affordable legal tool to fight back.

short_form_scripts.body: Most tenants give up because they think fighting back costs hundreds in legal fees. It doesn’t. Deposits-Back.com writes your official state-specific demand letter in 60 seconds. No signup. No subscription. Just a one-time $19.99 fee.

short_form_scripts.hook: 3 things your landlord legally cannot deduct from your security deposit 👇
short_form_scripts.body: Number one: normal wear and tear. Number two: pre-existing damage. Number three: vague ‘cleaning fees’ with zero receipts. If they already took your money, you need to send a demand letter immediately.
